handoff.reason: DISPATCH-2026-05-08-008: Re-stamp 174 source files on feature/source-headers-dogfood with fixed @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 format

blockers.description: header-generator.ts formatAsComments() emits '@exports: [Name1, Name2]' with brackets + colon, but semantic-header-parser.ts parseExportsList() + IDENTIFIER_RE rejects bracket-wrapped names → headerStatus: 'partial', rag-index skips all chunks. Three paths require ORCHESTRATOR ruling: (A) fix header-generator to emit bare identifiers without brackets/colon; (B) fix parser to strip brackets; (C) revert 174 stripped files to WO-001 state.

communication_log.note: WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-002 created; light plan, 1 phase, 7 tasks. Predecessor WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-001 archived. Fresh re-run dispatch from DISPATCH-2026-05-08-008.

ADJ-A: Files already had @coderef-semantic:1.0.0 format (WO-001 state). ADJ-B: Strip executed (174 blocks removed). T1.3: Re-ran --source-headers but generator emits @exports: [Name1, Name2] with brackets; parser rejects brackets via IDENTIFIER_RE → headerStatus: partial → rag-index skips all chunks. HALT awaiting ORCHESTRATOR ruling on fix path: (A) fix header-generator emit format, (B) fix parser bracket tolerance, (C) revert to WO-001 state.
Path (A): fix generator, not parser. Parser is authoritative.
Discovered second mismatch: generator insertHeaders() placed semantic block AFTER existing file JSDoc; parser /^\s*\/\*\*/ anchor takes only the first block. Halted for second ruling.
Path (A): insert before existing file header. Parser is authoritative; generator conforms.

Generator fixed (insert-before + no-bracket emit). 174 src files restamped. 41 files headerStatus:defined. rag-index: 409 chunks attempted embedding (OpenAI key absent, pre-existing). Commit 158992e pushed to origin/feature/source-headers-dogfood.
Phase 1 complete. Two generator fixes shipped (formatAsComments + insertHeaders). AC met: chunks_attempted_embedding=409 > 0.
